nasb.text: For I heard a cry as of a woman in labor, The anguish as of one giving birth to her first child, The cry of the daughter of Zion gasping for breath, Stretching out her hands, saying, “Ah, woe is me, for I faint before murderers.”

esv.text: For I heard a cry as of a woman in labor, anguish as of one giving birth to her first child, the cry of the daughter of Zion gasping for breath, stretching out her hands, “Woe is me! I am fainting before murderers.”

cnv.text: 我聽到好像婦人產痛的叫聲， 正像生頭胎孩子的婦人疼痛的叫聲， 就是錫安居民的聲音，他們喘著氣， 伸開雙手，說： “哎！我有禍了！ 在那些殺人者跟前，我發昏了！”

ccb.text: 我听见好像妇人分娩时的喊叫声， 好像妇人生头胎时的痛苦呻吟。 那是锡安城的喊叫声， 她在喘息，伸出双手说： “噢！我有祸了， 我要死在杀戮者手上了。”
